result.status_detail: wrtn session stuck in onboarding phone-verification gate; chat interface unreachable. W1+W2 regression could not be exercised.

notes: W1+W2 regression check vs baseline SUCCESS #1187. Opened wrtn.ai -> redirected to wrtn.ai/onboarding (phone-number verification step: '나중에 아이디나 비밀번호를 찾을 수 있도록 전화번호 인증해 주세요' with 전화번호 input + '인증 요청' button). Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) kept the onboarding gate. Tried wrtn.ai/u -> 404; '홈으로 이동하기' redirected straight back to /onboarding. No chat input, no avatar-with-chat state reachable. Account is stuck behind an SMS phone-verification onboarding gate that cannot be completed autonomously. Same FAIL_AUTH regression class as #1204 (logged out). Did NOT type the test PII prompt because no chat input was available. Auth must be restored / onboarding completed on the test PC before W1+W2 can be re-verified.
